prose: **Aniline Fukui reactivity analysis** — fukui-reactivity; DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout none --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpzci6k7bj/live.json`.
